summary: EXP-384 closes ISS-1957 (orphan, major severity, WIN-014.c7 H1) with two narrow precision patches making the implied August 2026 ΔB premise explicit. Through κ = 1.677 nT/µGal, PRED-TIER-3's 10–13 µGal SG-pulse target back-implies a ΔB band of 16.77–21.80 nT at the named target stations — at or above the upper edge of the 5–15 nT global eclipse-magnetic typical totality ensemble (Kim & Chang 2018, already cited in both WIN-014 and SEC-6.14). PATCH-A modifies the SEC-6.14 vise paragraph with one explicit-arithmetic insertion that acknowledges the ISS author's counter-arithmetic (10–13 nT through κ yields 5.96–7.75 µGal, below the 10–13 µGal target) head-on, then shows the dome must commit to an above-ensemble ΔB premise to keep the κ derivation arithmetically self-consistent. PATCH-B mirrors this in WIN-014.detail_evidence as a single parenthetical clause. Both anchors uniqueness-verified (count=1 in each file). review_class=deep-attack (overriding ISS-1957 class_hint='verification' via PROP-025 author authority — patches add a new explicit derivation step and a new comparison vs ensemble, closing the 'unstated ΔB premise' defender pivot). Tracker entry self-written by this run per orphan-rescue procedure. Decider routing: apply both find_replace patches; on successful build, close ISS-1957 as fixed-pending-verification.
